_description: This file documents the complete firmware configuration required for the Primary Shelly. The deploy script applies these settings via RPC.

input:0.name: RC Button
input:0._comment: Physical momentary button for manual control

switch:0.name: Main Contactor
switch:0._comment: CRITICAL: Must default OFF. Controls main power contactor.

switch:1.name: Indicator Light
switch:1._comment: Visual indicator light, mirrors main contactor state

button:200.name: HA Toggle Button
button:200._comment: Virtual button for Home Assistant REST API integration

script:1.name: Primary Control Logic
script:1._comment: Main control script with 1-hour safety timer

mqtt._comment: MQTT broker must be configured separately

bthomedevice:200.name: BLU Button 1
bthomedevice:200._comment: Paired Shelly BLU Button for wireless control
